user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: Café Moderno (near AGO)
fields.description: Quick coffee break at a nearby café just a short walk from the Art Gallery of Ontario. Great for coffee, light pastries, and a brief rest after the workshop.

insertion_point.reasoning: The workshop ends at 11:00AM and the AGO visit starts at 12:00PM. Inserting a short coffee break (11:15–11:50) between the 11:00 workshop and the 12:00 museum visit fits the gap and is placed before the AGO entry at position 2.
